Donor Briefing

Briefing for Sarah Jenkins

Generated June 14, 2024 at 10:24 AM

Strategic Overview

Sarah is a long-term champion of our mission with a particular focus on systemic infrastructure. Her giving has evolved from general donations to strategic project-based funding. She values data-driven impact reports and maintains a personal connection with our field directors. Currently, she is exploring a major gift for the Sub-Saharan expansion.

Donor Profile

Lifetime Value $425,000
Donor Tier Platinum Legacy
Last Gift $50,000
auto_awesome

colors_spark AI-Suggested Talking Points

1

Connect the recent success of the Nairobi Borehole Project directly to her initial seed funding from 2021.

2

Highlight the 14% increase in water equity reach documented in the last quarterly briefing she engaged with.

3

Invite her to the Executive Field Circle in Cape Town next October, aligning with her expressed interest in direct site visits.

Recent Activity

May 12, 2024

Attended Annual Impact Gala, participated in VIP round-table.

Apr 05, 2024

Email inquiry regarding the Sub-Saharan climate resilience report.

Feb 14, 2024

Personal check-in call with Regional Director, Marcus Aurelius.

Primary Interests

Water Equity Sub-Saharan Africa Infrastructure Dev Sustainable Agriculture Women in Tech Policy Reform

"The future of global health is tied to the purity of our local aquifers."

— Quote from Sarah at 2023 Summit
